form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months 4th of 10 at Goulburn Bm58 on March 22 over 1100m, slow going 5 len behind Molteuno carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 7th of 14 at Wagga Cl1 on May 2 over 1200m, 4 len behind Miss Emma carrying 57.5kg at $10. Fitter and should give a good account.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 900m lost its rightful running and had to be restrained.

Began awkwardly. Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Inclined to lay outwards while under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 11 at Albury Cl2 on March 20 over 1000m, on a slow track; long-neck behind Hello Romeo carrying 55kg at $4.40. The start before that set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Wagga Ctry Cl1 on March 12 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Wear The Crown with 57.5kg at $1.95. Continues to race well without winning and is a force to be reckoned with again.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. First-up 6th of 8 at Goulburn Ctry Cl1 on March 10 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Cruizingthestars carrying 59kg at $3.70. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 11 at Wagga Ctry Bm58 on March 29 over 1200m, slow going 2.5 len behind La Mer Bleue carrying 58.5kg at $6. Best form stacks up nicely so worth another chance with blinkers applied for the first time.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd in a small field at Sapphire Coast Cl1 on March 30 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Harry The Thief carrying 56.5kg at $7. Before that won by 0.5 len at Canberra Fedral Mdn March 8 over 1000m in soft going defeating Stormy Reign carrying 56kg at $21. Consistent filly who is expected to run well again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months came from midfield and won by 1.1 len at Wagga Mdn-Sw March 29 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Sweet Farnan with 56.5kg at $7. Previously second-up ran last of 8 at Canberra Mdn on September 5 over 1000m, slow going 13 len behind Sweet Warrior carrying 53kg at $9.50. Back better than ever and from a nice draw can feature again.
